sourceNotes.openai_changelog: https://developers.openai.com/changelog/ returned 403 on 2026-04-03. Blocked by Cloudflare or bot protection. Use WebSearch as fallback.
sourceNotes.anthropic_releases: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/release-notes/overview is fetchable via WebFetch as of 2026-04-09. Best primary source for Anthropic API changes.
sourceNotes.gemini_changelog: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/changelog returned 403 on 2026-04-03. Use WebSearch as fallback.
sourceNotes.n8n_releases: https://docs.n8n.io/release-notes/ returned 403 on 2026-04-03. Use WebSearch as fallback.
sourceNotes.zapier_updates: https://community.zapier.com/product-updates returned 403 on 2026-04-03. Use WebSearch as fallback.
sourceNotes.anthropic_news: https://www.anthropic.com/news returned 403 on 2026-04-03. Use WebSearch as fallback.
sourceNotes.anthropic_deprecations: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/model-deprecations works via WebFetch. Good source for deadline tracking.
sourceNotes.releasebot: https://releasebot.io/updates/* returned 403 on 2026-04-03. Previously worked, now blocked.

searchTips: Generic AI news searches return too many aggregator results. Use specific product names.
Asian sources often break news 6 to 12 hours before Western coverage.
Hacker News front page is a good signal for what builders care about.
All 6 primary source URLs returned 403 on 2026-04-03. WebSearch remains the reliable fallback.
Anthropic model deprecations page (platform.claude.com) is fetchable and authoritative for deadline tracking.
GitHub releases pages (e.g. github.com/openai/codex/releases) are fetchable and give exact dates.
Press release wires (24-7pressrelease, financialcontent) often carry open source launch announcements before major tech outlets.
improvements: First run: 2026-04-02. Baseline established.
2026-04-02: All 6 primary WebFetch sources returned 403. Compensated with 10 WebSearch queries. Consider adding alternative direct URLs (e.g., GitHub release pages, RSS feeds) for future runs.
2026-04-02: Digest produced 12 items (1 CRITICAL, 4 WATCH, 7 LOW). Distribution looks healthy.
2026-04-02 evening: Ran evening catch-up at 8pm Almaty / 3pm UTC. No new CRITICAL items found.

2026-04-03: Quiet news day. Focused on approaching Anthropic API deadlines (Haiku 3 retirement April 20, 1M context beta April 30) and Anthropic tools GA. 3 items total. Quality over quantity approach.
2026-04-03: Discovered platform.claude.com/docs deprecations page is fetchable via WebFetch. Added to sourceNotes for future runs.
2026-04-03: Releasebot.io and llm-stats.com also now return 403. Fewer fetchable sources than April 2.

2026-04-03 evening: Second run. Google Gemini Flex/Priority tiers, axios supply chain attack, Gemini billing caps, and Qwen 3.6 Plus Preview. 4 items (2 CRITICAL, 2 WATCH). Replaced morning digest for the same dateKey.
2026-04-03: Google blog posts (blog.google) also return 403 via WebFetch. Confirmed via search results instead.
2026-04-03: Axios supply chain attack (March 30) is a critical security item. Even though 4 days old, included because it directly affects npm-based AI toolchains and was not in previous digests.

2026-04-04: 4 items (2 CRITICAL, 2 WATCH). Gemma 4 open model family (Apache 2.0, function calling), Claude Haiku 3 retirement countdown (15 days), Vercel AI SDK 6 Agent abstraction, Anthropic 1M context beta retirement April 30.
2026-04-04: All 6 primary WebFetch sources still return 403. WebSearch remains the only viable approach.
2026-04-04: Gemini billing cap changes (April 1) and Flex/Priority tiers already in April 3 digest. Skipped to avoid duplication.
2026-04-05: 4 items (2 CRITICAL, 2 WATCH). Anthropic third party tool cutoff (immediate), Gemini 2.0/2.5 June deprecation wave, OpenAI Assistants API August sunset, Claw Code open source launch.
2026-04-05: All 6 primary WebFetch sources still return 403. llm-stats.com and devflokers.com also return 403.

2026-04-05: Heavy deprecation awareness day. Three major API providers (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI) all have active or approaching retirement deadlines. Consider a consolidated deadline tracker item in future digests.
2026-04-05: Anthropic third party tool cutoff is the biggest immediate action item. Affects anyone routing Claude through non-Anthropic agent tools using subscription credentials.
2026-04-06: 4 items (0 CRITICAL, 3 WATCH, 1 LOW). OpenAI Codex pay-as-you-go pricing, Gemini Deep Research Agent API, OpenAI Sora two-stage shutdown, Gemini TTS models preview.
2026-04-06: All 6 primary WebFetch sources still return 403. llm-stats.com also returns 403. WebSearch remains the only viable approach.

2026-04-06: Quieter news day. Most major items from the week (Anthropic tool cutoff, Gemini deprecation wave, Claude Code leak) already covered in previous digests. Focused on pricing changes and new API capabilities not yet reported.
2026-04-07: 4 items (0 CRITICAL, 2 WATCH, 2 LOW). Anthropic 300K Batches API output, n8n MCP client/server nodes, Google Lyria 3 music API, ChatGPT CarPlay launch.
2026-04-07: All 6 primary WebFetch sources still return 403. Skipped WebFetch attempts entirely based on agent notes history. WebSearch only.
2026-04-07: Claude.ai had a major outage April 6 (resolved same day). Not included in digest as it is an operational event, not a capability or API change.
2026-04-07: n8n MCP client/server nodes (v1.88) are highly relevant for the reader who uses both n8n and MCP. Exact release date of 1.88 unclear but recent.
2026-04-07: Detached HEAD issue on git push. Fixed by checking out main and merging. Future runs should ensure they are on main branch before committing.
2026-04-08: 3 items (1 CRITICAL, 2 WATCH, 0 LOW). Gemini 3.1 Ultra (2M context, GPQA 94.3%), OpenAI legacy Codex model removal (6 models, April 14 cutoff), n8n 2.16.0 Data Table MCP tool.
2026-04-08: All 6 primary WebFetch sources still return 403. llm-stats.com also returns 403. Skipped WebFetch attempts entirely. WebSearch only.
2026-04-08: GitHub releases pages (github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases) remain fetchable via WebFetch. Good source for n8n release details.
2026-04-08: Gemini 3.1 Ultra release date ambiguous across sources (some say March, others April 5). Used April 5 based on most specific source. Not in any previous digest so included regardless.
2026-04-08: Claude outage continued April 7 (elevated errors, 1700+ Downdetector reports). Excluded per established precedent of skipping operational events.
2026-04-08: Detached HEAD issue recurred. Fixed again by checking out main and merging. The repo enters detached HEAD state between sessions.

2026-04-08 evening: Replaced morning digest. 6 items (1 CRITICAL, 3 WATCH, 2 LOW). Claude Mythos Preview / Project Glasswing (CRITICAL), Frontier Model Forum anti-distillation coalition, OpenAI Codex legacy model removal (carried from morning), Veo 3.1 Fast price cut, Codex CLI update, n8n 2.16.0 Data Table MCP (carried from morning).

2026-04-08 evening: Claude Mythos Preview is the biggest story of the week. Anthropic built its most capable model and restricted it to security research only. Multiple tier 1 sources (TechCrunch, CNBC, Fortune, Axios) all dated April 7.
2026-04-08 evening: Dropped Gemini 3.1 Ultra from morning digest. Original date was April 5, exceeding the 48 hour window on this run.

2026-04-08 evening: Frontier Model Forum anti-distillation story (Bloomberg April 6, Japan Times April 7) is industry defining. OpenAI, Anthropic, Google cooperating on threat intelligence is unprecedented.
2026-04-08 evening: Detached HEAD issue recurred again. 29 commits were stranded. Fixed by merging d816cbd into main before committing. Root cause: sessions start in detached HEAD state.

2026-04-08 evening: GPT-5.4 mini/nano confirmed as March 17. Sora API expansion confirmed as March 12. Responses API Skills confirmed as February 11. Mistral Large 3 confirmed as December 2025. All excluded as stale.
2026-04-08 evening: No new Zapier, Make.com, or Airtable product updates found for April 7-8. Zapier latest documented updates are from February 2026.

2026-04-09: 5 items (2 CRITICAL, 2 WATCH, 1 LOW). Claude Managed Agents public beta (CRITICAL), Meta Muse Spark proprietary model launch (CRITICAL), ant CLI launch, Claude Messages API on Bedrock research preview, OpenAI Codex 3M users milestone.
2026-04-09: platform.claude.com/docs/en/release-notes/overview is now fetchable via WebFetch. This is the best source for Anthropic API changes. Updated sourceNotes accordingly.
2026-04-09: All other 5 primary WebFetch sources still return 403. WebSearch remains the fallback for OpenAI, Google, n8n, Zapier.
2026-04-09: Claude Managed Agents is the biggest Anthropic platform launch since Agent Skills (October 2025). Fully managed agent harness with sandboxing, tools, and SSE streaming.
2026-04-09: Meta Muse Spark is proprietary, breaking Meta's open source tradition. Private API preview only for select partners. Signals Meta entering the paid API market.
2026-04-09: Detached HEAD issue recurred again. Fixed by fetching origin/main and resetting. Root cause remains: sessions start in detached HEAD state.
2026-04-09: No new Zapier, Make.com, or Airtable product updates found for April 8-9.
2026-04-09: Claude outage continued April 8 (Sonnet 4.6 errors 23:00-01:50 PT). Excluded per established precedent.
